challenge.title: Ugnjezdi Vise Elemenata unutar Jednog div Elementa
challenge.description:
div element, poznat i kao division element, je opsti kontejner za druge elemente.

div je jedan od najcesce koriscenih HTML elemenata.

Kao i svaki drugi element koji nije self-closing, div se otvara sa <div> i zatvara na drugom redu sa </div>.
challenge.instructions:
Ugnjezdite liste "Things cats love" i "Top 3 things cats hate" unutar jednog div elementa.

Hint: Pokusajte da stavite otvarajuci div tag iznad p elementa "Things cats love", a zatvarajuci div tag posle zatvarajuceg ol taga, kako bi obe liste bile unutar istog div elementa.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
CatPhotoApp

Click here to view more cat photos.

Things cats love:

  • catnip
  • laser pointers
  • lasagna

Top 3 things cats hate:

  1. flea treatment
  2. thunder
  3. other cats

tests.text: Vasi p elementi treba da budu ugnjezdeni unutar vaseg div elementa.
Vas ul element treba da bude ugnjezden unutar vaseg div elementa.
Vas ol element treba da bude ugnjezden unutar vaseg div elementa.
Vas div element treba da ima zatvarajuci tag.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
The best page ever

Cat ipsum dolor sit amet, jump launch to pounce upon little yarn mouse, bare fangs at toy run hide in litter box until treats are fed. Go into a room to decide you didn't want to be in there anyway. I like big cats and i can not lie kitty ipsum dolor sit amet, shed everywhere shed everywhere stretching attack your ankles chase the red dot, hairball run catnip eat the grass sniff. Meow i could pee on this if i had the energy for slap owner's face at 5am until human fills food dish yet scamper. Knock dish off table head butt cant eat out of my own dish scratch the furniture. Make meme, make cute face. Sleep in the bathroom sink chase laser but pee in the shoe. Paw at your fat belly licks your face and eat grass, throw it back up kitty ipsum dolor sit amet, shed everywhere shed everywhere stretching attack your ankles chase the red dot, hairball run catnip eat the grass sniff.
